# make_generator_2state { #tslai.make_generator_2state }

```python
tslai.make_generator_2state(q_AB, q_BA)
```

Build the 2-state ancestry CTMC generator (CLAUDE.md §2.1).

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**q_AB**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Instantaneous A->B rate.

<code>[**q_BA**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Instantaneous B->A rate.

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[numpy](`numpy`).[ndarray](`numpy.ndarray`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   The ``(2, 2)`` generator ``Q = [[-q_AB, q_AB], [q_BA, -q_BA]]``.

## Examples {.doc-section .doc-section-examples}

```python
>>> make_generator_2state(1e-3, 1e-3)
array([[-0.001,  0.001],
       [ 0.001, -0.001]])
```
